title: URGENT CARE - 211info
text: LEGACY URGENT CARE WOODBURN URGENT CARE Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides treatment for minor illnesses or injuries that do not require hospitalization but need direct attention. 1475 Mt Hood Avenue Suite 110 Woodburn, OR 97071 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Monday-Friday 8:30am-6:30-pm (971) 983-5360 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (971) 983-5360 INTAKE PROCEDURE: Walk in, call, or visit website for more information FEES: Accepts Medicaid, Medicare, and private insurance. Discounts, financial assistance, and payment plans may be available for uninsured patients. DOCUMENTS: Insurance information, if applicable AREA SERVED: State of Oregon Services: Urgent Care Centers If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. LEGACY URGENT CARE WOODBURN
